comment: 62yo male, 25 years occupational asbestos exposure (shipyard insulator pre-regulation era), current smoker. No current cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan (after Agent G Wave 2 pilot lands): standard = annual LDCT chest from 10y post first exposure + smoking cessation counseling + pleural surveillance discussion; alternative = routine general-population screening only. Validates v0.3 IARC Group 1 occupational pilot.
